content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and HMHomeManager instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift (App/WallpaperGridView.swift:2-5), but the app is a wallpaper browsing app with no home-automation UI; metadata (description.txt) describes only wallpapers, no home features.
Pierre: Apple flags apps that import HomeKit without providing genuine home-automation functionality, per 2.5.1's guidance that frameworks must be used for their intended purpose — this looks like unused/leftover code that could trigger review rejection. Since the manager is instantiated but never used to display or manage homes/accessories, remove the HomeKit import entirely unless real home-automation features are planned. Verify there's no HomeKit usage description in Info.plist either, as an unused privacy purpose string would compound the concern.
